subcodes.first_line: The souls who, in this day, have quaffed the sealed wine from the hand of the Self-Subsisting Sovereign must be mindful of wisdom and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نفوسیکه الیوم از دست سلطان قیوم رحیق مختوم آشامیده اند باید بحکمت ناظر باشند و
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @unity; oneness of humanity, @wisdom [hikmat], @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
